allow: Bash(timeout 5 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3001 >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done')

Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\('playwright'\); \(async \(\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\({ args: ['--no-sandbox'] }\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:3001'\); await p.waitForSelector\('text=HoweverIna'\); await p.screenshot\({ path: '/tmp/v2-home.png', fullPage: false }\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:3001/portfolio'\); await p.waitForTimeout\(2000\); await p.screenshot\({ path: '/tmp/v2-portfolio.png', fullPage: false }\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:3001/blog'\); await p.waitForTimeout\(2000\); await p.screenshot\({ path: '/tmp/v2-blog.png', fullPage: false }\); await b.close\(\); console.log\('done'\); }\)\(\)")
